book.glyphbound.guide.name: Brushbound Primer
book.glyphbound.guide.landing_text: Read by stage instead of memorizing the whole system first.$(br2)Start with Stage 0, craft your first stave, then move through Stages 1-5: survival, exploration, field control, high-tier counterplay, and the Ink Realm.$(br2)Numbers and full glyph notes are kept in the final reference.
